services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From traction to scale, we provide executive-level guidance and startup-speed execution to move priorities forward.
services.compareConsultingDesc: Business Enablement — strategy, operations, and growth with accountable implementation support.
services.compareBuildingDesc: Websites & Digital — the site or platform you launch when the roadmap calls for it.
services.credibilityDesc: Executive-level consulting with the discipline to implement—not just recommend.
services.cred1Desc: Fractional COO experience applied to real operating constraints, not slide decks alone.
services.cred2Desc: Priorities, owners, and KPIs packaged for leadership decisions and follow-through.
services.cred3Desc: Strategy, process, people, and data aligned in one engagement model.
services.cred4Desc: Sensitive context stays protected—discuss your needs before sharing details.
services.engagementSubtitle: A disciplined four-step model that keeps strategy board-ready and execution accountable.
services.step1: Discovery call to align on goals, constraints, and urgency.
services.step2: Diagnostic sprint to isolate highest-impact priorities.
services.step3: Roadmap and operating plan with owners, milestones, and KPIs.
services.step4: Implementation support with cadence reviews and course correction.
services.fit1: Need strategic clarity and operating discipline—not just advice
services.fit2: Want owners, milestones, and KPIs tied to business priorities
services.fit3: Prefer a partner who stays through implementation, not a one-off report
services.fitDigitalNote: If you need a website or custom platform built—not consulting first—see Websites & Digital. Many clients start with consulting and add a build when the roadmap is clear.
services.faq1Q: Which service should I start with?
services.faq1A: Start with a discovery call—we'll map urgency to the right entry point. Many teams begin with strategic planning or process optimization, then expand.
services.faq2Q: How is this different from a big-firm engagement?
services.faq2A: You get senior attention without the overhead. We work in focused sprints with clear deliverables and direct access to the people doing the work.
services.faq3Q: Do you also build websites and platforms?
services.faq3A: Yes. Consulting lives here under Business Enablement; design and build work lives under Websites & Digital. One team can do both when it makes sense.
services.ctaSubtitle: Request a consultation to define the right entry point and leave with an executive-aligned action plan.
services.ctaQualifier: Best fit for growth-stage teams that need strategic clarity, operating discipline, and measurable execution.
services.ctaAssessment: Not sure which service fits? Take our 5-min assessment (secondary option)
services.confidentialityLink: Questions about confidentiality? Contact us to discuss your needs
services.crossLinkDigital: Need a website or custom platform built? See Websites & Digital
services.crossLinkOurWork: See live examples in Our Digital Work
services.s0Desc: Develop comprehensive business strategies that align with your vision and market opportunities.
services.s0Ideal: Best when: Leadership needs a clear growth direction, aligned priorities, and a decision framework
services.s0Outcome: A 90-day strategic plan with aligned priorities and measurable milestones.
services.s0NotFor: You only need one-off tactical execution without strategic alignment.
services.s1Desc: Streamline operations and improve efficiency through data-driven process improvements.
services.s1Ideal: Best when: Bottlenecks, handoff delays, or inconsistent delivery are constraining growth momentum
services.s1Outcome: Reduced cycle time, stronger ownership, and smoother operating rhythms.
services.s1NotFor: Your core process already performs reliably with clear ownership.
services.s2Desc: Build high-performing teams through leadership development and organizational design.
services.s2Ideal: Best when: Leadership gaps or team misalignment are limiting execution quality at scale
services.s2Outcome: Sharper role clarity, stronger leadership cadence, and improved cross-team execution.
services.s2NotFor: You only need short-term staffing rather than capability development.
services.s3Desc: Transform your data into actionable insights for better decision-making.
services.s3Ideal: Best when: You have data volume, but decision velocity and clarity remain low
services.s3Outcome: Decision-ready dashboards and KPI systems tied directly to business priorities.
services.s3NotFor: You need data warehousing-only support without decision workflows.
services.s4Desc: Foster a culture of innovation and implement cutting-edge solutions.
services.s4Ideal: Best when: You need to validate new initiatives before committing full capital and team bandwidth
services.s4Outcome: A de-risked pilot roadmap with clear success metrics and adoption paths.
services.s4NotFor: You only need routine optimization of existing mature workflows.
services.s5Desc: Navigate the digital landscape with comprehensive transformation strategies.
services.s5Ideal: Best when: You need coordinated process, technology, and change rollout across functions
services.s5Outcome: A phased transformation plan that improves adoption, alignment, and execution confidence.
services.s5NotFor: You are only replacing a single tool without operational redesign.

digitalBuilds.title: Websites & Digital
digitalBuilds.subtitle: Launch-ready sites and purpose-built platforms — scoped, designed, and shipped by the team that knows how to ship the product.
digitalBuilds.proofDesc: Every example is in production — click through to experience the work firsthand.
digitalBuilds.fit1: Need a credible web presence or custom tool—not just a strategy deck
digitalBuilds.fit2: Want staging links, review checkpoints, and a clear launch plan
digitalBuilds.fit3: Prefer one accountable team from scope through production
digitalBuilds.fitConsultingNote: Not sure whether you need consulting, a website, or a platform first? We help you choose the right entry point—many clients start with Business Enablement and add a build when the roadmap is clear.
digitalBuilds.faq1Q: Website or platform—which do I need?
digitalBuilds.faq1A: Marketing sites, booking flows, and brand presence are websites. Dashboards, user roles, workflows, and integrations usually mean a custom platform. We'll clarify on a short discovery call.
digitalBuilds.faq2Q: How long does a typical build take?
digitalBuilds.faq2A: Marketing sites often land in 4–8 weeks. MVP platforms typically run 8–16 weeks depending on scope, integrations, and review cycles.
digitalBuilds.faq3Q: Do you maintain the product after launch?
digitalBuilds.faq3A: Yes. We plan for iteration after go-live—fixes, enhancements, and phased features based on real usage, not a handoff and disappear.
digitalBuilds.compareConsultingDesc: Digital Transformation — enterprise-wide change under Business Enablement
digitalBuilds.compareBuildingDesc: Websites & Digital — the site or platform you launch
digitalBuilds.s0D1: Brand-aligned pages with mobile-first responsive layout
digitalBuilds.s0D2: Booking, forms, and conversion paths wired and tested
digitalBuilds.s0D3: SEO-ready structure, metadata, and launch checklist
digitalBuilds.s1D1: Custom workflows, roles, and dashboards matched to your operations
digitalBuilds.s1D2: Integrations and automation where they reduce manual work
digitalBuilds.s1D3: Phased rollout with review checkpoints and clear milestones
digitalBuilds.s1D4: Post-launch iteration based on real usage feedback
digitalBuilds.credibilityTitle: How we work with digital clients
digitalBuilds.credDeliverablesDesc: Wireframes → staging URL → production launch with a clear checklist
digitalBuilds.credTimelinesDesc: Marketing site: 4–8 weeks · MVP platform: 8–16 weeks (scope-dependent)
digitalBuilds.credCollaborationDesc: Staging links, review checkpoints, and a clear owner on our side
digitalBuilds.credStackDesc: Built on maintainable, widely supported technology you can grow with
digitalBuilds.s0Desc: High-trust marketing sites, booking flows, and conversion-focused web presence built to represent your brand with clarity and credibility.
digitalBuilds.s0Ideal: Best when: You need a high-trust marketing site, booking flow, or conversion-focused web presence
digitalBuilds.s0Outcome: Launch-ready site aligned to your brand, with clear paths to book, contact, or convert.
digitalBuilds.s0NotFor: You need complex user accounts, dashboards, or multi-role workflows.
digitalBuilds.s0Proof: See Ken Effect in Our Digital Work
digitalBuilds.s1Desc: Purpose-built software when off-the-shelf tools won't fit — workflow-specific platforms integrated with how your team operates.
digitalBuilds.s1F3: Iterative build cadence with review checkpoints
digitalBuilds.s1Ideal: Best when: Off-the-shelf tools won't fit and you need workflow-specific software
digitalBuilds.s1Outcome: Purpose-built platform integrated with how your team actually operates.
digitalBuilds.s1NotFor: A brochure or marketing site is sufficient.
digitalBuilds.s1Proof: See Business Cocoon & Soaring Puck in Our Digital Work

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services and how we can help your business.
faq.stillHaveQuestions: Still have questions? We're here to help.
faq.a0: Fractional COO services provide businesses with senior-level operational expertise on a part-time or project basis. This allows companies to access strategic operational leadership without the cost of a full-time COO, making it ideal for growing businesses that need expert operational guidance.
faq.q1: How long does a typical consulting engagement last?
faq.a1: Engagement duration varies based on your needs. Some projects are short-term (1-3 months) for specific initiatives, while others are ongoing partnerships. We work flexibly to match your business requirements and can adjust our involvement as your needs evolve.
faq.a2: We work with businesses across various industries including technology, manufacturing, professional services, retail, healthcare, and more. Our methodologies are adaptable to different business models and sectors.
faq.a3: We take confidentiality seriously. All team members sign non-disclosure agreements, and we follow strict data security protocols. Your business information is treated with the utmost discretion and protected at all times.
faq.q4: What is included in a free consultation?
faq.a4: During your free consultation, we'll discuss your business goals, challenges, and opportunities. We'll provide initial insights and recommendations, and together we'll determine if our services are a good fit for your needs. There's no obligation to proceed.
faq.q5: Do you work with small businesses?
faq.a5: Absolutely! We work with businesses of all sizes, from startups to established companies. Our services are scalable and tailored to meet the specific needs and budgets of each client, regardless of company size.
faq.q6: How quickly can you start working with us?
faq.a6: We typically can begin engagements within 1-2 weeks of initial consultation, depending on project scope and our current capacity. For urgent matters, we can often accommodate faster timelines.
faq.q7: What makes Roalla different from other consulting firms?
faq.a7: Our combination of deep financial expertise, strategic business acumen, and hands-on implementation support sets us apart. We don't just provide recommendations—we work alongside you to implement solutions and ensure they deliver real results for your business.

about.title: About Roalla Business Enablement Group
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner in business transformation and operational excellence.
about.story1: Roalla was founded on the principle that every business deserves a clear path to success. Our team of experienced consultants is passionate about helping you navigate the complexities of the modern business landscape.
about.story2: We believe in building strong, collaborative partnerships with our clients. Your vision is our mission, and we are dedicated to providing the strategies and support you need to achieve your goals.
about.teamSubtitle: Professional consultants ready to help your business succeed
about.excellenceDesc: We maintain the highest standards in everything we do, delivering exceptional results that exceed expectations.
about.integrityDesc: Honest, transparent relationships built on trust and mutual respect with every client we serve.
about.commitmentDesc: Dedicated to your success with unwavering focus and long-term partnership approach.
about.innovationDesc: Cutting-edge strategies and creative solutions to keep you ahead of the competition.
about.missionQuote: To empower businesses and entrepreneurs with strategic insights, innovative solutions, and unwavering support to achieve their full potential and create lasting impact in their industries.

login.oauthErrorAccountNotLinked: This email is already linked to another sign-in method. Sign in with email/password or the provider you originally used (e.g. Google).
login.oauthErrorCallback: Sign-in callback failed (often DB/linking). Check Railway logs for [NextAuth] Auth error—set NEXTAUTH_DEBUG=1 for details.
login.oauthErrorMicrosoft: Microsoft or Apple sign-in failed. Check: (1) Redirect URI in Azure/Apple matches your app URL + /api/auth/callback/azure-ad or /api/auth/callback/apple; (2) AUTH_TRUST_HOST=true and NEXTAUTH_URL in Railway. To see the real error: set NEXTAUTH_DEBUG=1 in Railway, retry sign-in, then check Railway logs.
login.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
